headline: Incyte Japan Announces Approval of Minjuvi® (tafasitamab) in Combination with Lenalidomide for the Treatment of Adults with Relapsed or Refractory Diffuse Large B-Cell Lymphoma (DLBCL)
summary: WILMINGTON, Del., June 19, 2026--Incyte Japan Announces Approval of Minjuvi (tafasitamab) in Combination with Lenalidomide for Adults with Relapsed or Refractory DLBCL
